scripts.shell:build: npm --prefix apps/ios-shell install && npm --prefix apps/ios-shell run build
scripts.shell:ios:sync: npm run shell:build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.test:unit:ci: vitest run tests/unit/auth tests/unit/ui tests/unit/api && vitest run tests/unit/account tests/unit/affiliate tests/unit/profile tests/unit/snapshots && vitest run tests/unit/catalog tests/unit/domain tests/unit/evidence tests/unit/recommendation tests/unit/runtime tests/unit/security tests/unit/social-video tests/unit/travel-support tests/unit/trending tests/unit/trip-compass
scripts.test:smoke: npm run lint && vitest run tests/unit/smoke.spec.tsx && npm run build
